headline: Assessing Workday (WDAY) Valuation After Recent Share Price Weakness
summary: Workday’s recent share performance and business profile Workday (WDAY) has been under pressure recently, with the stock showing negative returns over the past day, week, month and past 3 months. This has prompted investors to reassess how its fundamentals line up with today’s price. The company operates as an enterprise cloud applications provider, offering financial management, human capital management, planning and other software solutions to customers in the United States and...
